title: Radiator
description: Radiator configuration. v0.2.0 adds Extension 3A geometry_mode, BOL/EOL emissivity, cavity emissivity, and background_sink_temp_k_override fields per 3A-spec §9. Baseline fields preserved. Area computed per §22.2, §12.2. Margin per §32.3.

emissivity.description: Baseline emissivity field (pre-3A). Preserved for backward compat. 3A uses surface_emissivity_bol.

view_factor.description: Radiator view factor F per §12.2. Baseline field. 3A uses face_a_view_factor / face_b_view_factor.

effective_area_m2.description: If omitted, runtime computes from rejection requirement per §22.2.

sink_temp_k.description: T_sink_effective baseline field. Defaults to 0 K per §40. 3A uses background_sink_temp_k_override and §9.4 priority chain.

geometry_class.description: Physical deployment geometry class (baseline). Not to be confused with 3A geometry_mode (thermal face configuration).

geometry_mode.description: 3A thermal face geometry mode. §9.1–§9.2. Default: single_sided.

face_a_area_m2.description: 3A face A area in m². §9.1. Required when enable_model_extension_3a=true.

face_b_area_m2.description: 3A face B area in m². 0 for single_sided. §9.1.

face_b_view_factor.description: 3A face B view factor. 0 for single_sided. §9.1, §9.3.

surface_emissivity_bol.description: 3A BOL surface emissivity. No silent default. §9.1, §12.2, §13.3.

surface_emissivity_eol_override.description: 3A EOL emissivity override. If present, takes priority over degradation calculation. §9.1, §11.7.

emissivity_degradation_fraction.description: 3A mission-life emissivity degradation fraction. epsilon_eol = epsilon_bol*(1-f). §9.1, §11.7.

cavity_view_factor.description: 3A cavity view factor F_cavity. Required when cavity_emissivity_mode=gray_cavity_approx. §9.1, §9.3.

background_sink_temp_k_override.description: 3A per-radiator T_sink override (K). Priority 1 per §9.4 T_sink resolution chain.
